title: Energy innovators you need to know about: EcoPhi, Noble Carbon, and Syncrowin earn top spots in DTECH Initiate startup competition
description: Startups showcased innovations in electricity at DTECH in San Diego, California. EcoPhi won first place for its substation automation technology. Smart circuit breaker company Noble Carbon and AI-powered industrial automation startup Syncrowin rounded out the podium.
content: Startups showcased innovations in electricity at DTECH in San Diego, California. EcoPhi won first place for its substation automation technology. Smart circuit breaker company Noble Carbon and AI-powered industrial automation startup Syncrowin rounded out the podium.
